name: Freshchat API
what_it_does: Freshchat REST API — modern customer messaging platform from Freshworks supporting live chat, messaging (WhatsApp, Facebook, Apple Business), and AI-powered bots, enabling agents to automate conversation routing, contact management, and omnichannel support workflows.
use_cases: Agents creating and updating Freshchat conversations and user profiles from CRM events for proactive support outreach
Bot handoff automation — agents managing Freshchat AI bot-to-human handoff workflows based on conversation topics
Omnichannel messaging — agents sending WhatsApp and Facebook messages via Freshchat API for outbound customer engagement
Support analytics — agents fetching Freshchat conversation metrics, CSAT scores, and resolution times for reporting
User enrichment — agents updating Freshchat user properties with customer data from CRM for personalized support context
not_for: Simple live chat widget — Tawk.to is free; Freshchat requires paid subscription for most useful features
Standalone email ticketing — use Freshdesk for email-based ticket management; Freshchat focuses on real-time messaging
Small teams with tight budgets — Freshchat's pricing scales per agent; cheaper alternatives exist for small teams
best_when: You're using Freshworks suite (Freshdesk, Freshsales) and want tight integration between live chat, CRM, and helpdesk with API automation.
avoid_when: You're not using other Freshworks products — Intercom or Crisp provide better standalone chat experiences without the Freshworks ecosystem dependency.

auth.notes: API token from Freshchat account settings. Passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. Single token per account with full access. No scope granularity. Freshworks unified authentication available for cross-product access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 10 agents with basic live chat, limited features
pricing.notes: Per-agent pricing model. API access available on all tiers. Advanced features (AI bots, omnichannel, analytics) require higher tiers. Part of Freshworks suite — bundle pricing available with Freshdesk and Freshsales.

performance.rate_limits: 400 req/min per account on API calls; webhook delivery has retry logic

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with good documentation. Error responses include status codes and descriptions. Webhook events cover conversation, message, and user lifecycle. Some advanced features (bot flows) require Freshchat UI configuration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User creation/update by external_id is idempotent. Conversation creation is not idempotent — duplicate calls create duplicate conversations. Message sends are not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Freshchat uses its own user ID system — agents must create or find Freshchat users before sending messages
API endpoint URLs include the Freshchat subdomain — agents must configure domain dynamically per account
Bot flows and AI features require UI configuration — API can trigger but not build complex bot workflows
Rate limit (400 req/min) seems generous but applies per account across all API consumers including UI actions
WhatsApp messaging via Freshchat requires separate WhatsApp Business account approval and meta verification

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. TLS enforced. No scope granularity on API tokens. India data residency available. Freshworks security program is enterprise-grade.
